svg.text: Quickmerge in level order: L0 first, then L1, etc. Version bumps auto-triggered by GitHub Actions on merge to main.
Project management — pure root (manifest, templates, scripts, cursor rules). No dependencies. (1 repos)
Standards & codex — coding standards, architecture docs, quality gate templates. Depends on PM. (1 repos)
Foundation — zero inter-library dependencies (Tier 0). Depends on PM + codex for CI standards. (4 repos)
T1c + T2 libraries (reference-data, algo, feature-calculator) (3 repos)
Core interfaces (depends on UTEI, UTL, T0) (7 repos)
Foundational service (instruments only; no service-domain-data dependency) (1 repos)
Deployment infrastructure (deployment-api, deployment-service; deploys all services) (3 repos)
IaC + post-deploy validation (deploy last; references all service images) (3 repos)
All 0.x.x. Version 1.0.0 = first stable (GitHub Actions auto-bump on main merge). No local version bumping. CI/CD in level order.
53 repos: 1 apis, 3 api-services, 1 batch-services, 1 devopss, 3 infrastructures, 2 interfaces, 18 librarys, 21 services, 1 test-harnesss, 2 uis
Deployment modes: runtime-topology.yaml deployment_modes | Checklist SSOTs: checklist.template.{service,api-service,ui,library}.yaml
